title: Bountiful Braces
description: A simple supplementaries addon expanding on timber braces and frames to add all wood variations.
body:
A simple supplementaries addon expanding on timber braces and frames to add all wood variations.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1242631/description_ac6225c5-4a20-41fc-aaa8-e2383937a2d9.png)

All crafts consist of the desired wood planks surrounded by the desired base block.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1242631/description_7e0706e0-06d7-400f-8aaf-c01aa8199c85.png)
